name: Multiplier Global Employment API
what_it_does: Multiplier API for global employer-of-record (EOR) and payroll services. Enables programmatic access to employee onboarding, payroll, contracts, and compliance data across 150+ countries. Alternative to Deel and Oyster for international employment management.
use_cases: Querying employee onboarding status across countries from HR workflow agents
Retrieving payroll processing data and timelines from reporting agents
Accessing contract and compliance documentation from legal workflow agents
Monitoring benefits enrollment and employment status from HR automation agents
not_for: Domestic-only payroll (Multiplier optimized for international employment)
best_when: A company using Multiplier to hire internationally wants AI agents to automate HR workflows — querying employee status, payroll data, and compliance across multiple countries.
avoid_when: You need autonomous employment or payroll changes. PRIVACY RISK: International employee PII requires careful cross-border data handling.

auth.notes: Multiplier API uses API key authentication. Contact Multiplier for developer/partner API access.

pricing.notes: Multiplier charges per international employee. API access included with service.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: International employee PII across 150+ countries
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Limited public API documentation — partner access required
Employment and payroll modifications require human HR and legal oversight
Cross-border data transfer compliance varies by jurisdiction
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY RISK: Global employee PII, contracts, and payroll data. SOC2 and GDPR. Cross-border data handling. Employment changes require human oversight.

security_score_components.security_notes: International employee data across 150+ countries. SOC2 and GDPR. Cross-jurisdictional compliance required.
